description: Coaching domain taxonomy — seed data for the coaching_knowledge_base Qdrant store. Each entry is embedded using the embed_text field. Keywords grow over time as sessions confirm additional terms.

domains.name: Life coaching
domains.description: Supporting the coachee to gain clarity on identity, purpose, and direction in their personal life.
keywords: who do I want to be
domains.embed_text: Life coaching: identity, clarity, purpose, habits, growth, who I am, what I want, direction in life, self-discovery, personal growth, life goals, values, authentic self. Typical coaching levels L1-L2. Non-directive, client-led exploration of identity and life direction.

domains.name: Strength finder
domains.description: Helping the coachee discover and leverage their natural talents and strengths.
domains.embed_text: Strength finder coaching: strengths, self-awareness, talents, natural abilities, what I'm good at, gifts, unique value, what energises me. Typical levels L1-L2. Solution-focused, strengths-based approach to help the coachee see and use their natural capabilities.

domains.name: Wellness coaching
domains.description: Supporting the coachee to build sustainable health and wellbeing habits.
domains.embed_text: Wellness coaching: health, energy, sleep, exercise, stress, burnout, balance, wellbeing, self-care, exhausted, overwhelmed, healthy lifestyle, work-life balance. Typical levels L2-L3. Developmental coaching with feedback on patterns plus mentoring insight on sustainable habits.

domains.name: Confidence coaching
domains.description: Helping the coachee build self-belief and overcome fear, self-doubt, and imposter syndrome.
domains.embed_text: Confidence coaching: self-image, self-worth, fear, imposter syndrome, doubt, not good enough, believing in myself, self-belief, inner critic, fear of failure, feel like a fraud. Typical levels L1-L2. Pure coaching and developmental coaching to shift self-perception and build genuine confidence.

domains.name: Purpose coaching
domains.description: Supporting the coachee to clarify their values, meaning, and sense of direction.
domains.embed_text: Purpose coaching: meaning, values, mission, what matters, why I'm doing this, legacy, calling, north star, what do I stand for, lost my sense of purpose. Typical levels L1-L2. Deep exploration of values and meaning, fully client-led.

domains.name: Career coaching
domains.description: Supporting the coachee through career transitions, direction decisions, and professional positioning.
domains.embed_text: Career coaching: job change, career direction, positioning, promotion, transition, next role, career change, professional development, stuck in my career, career pivot, industry change. Typical levels L2-L4. Combines coaching with mentoring and consulting depending on how much direction the coachee needs.

domains.name: Performance coaching
domains.description: Improving the coachee's performance against targets, KPIs, and professional standards.
domains.embed_text: Performance coaching: sales, KPIs, targets, results, hitting numbers, under-performing, performance review, productivity, accountability. Typical levels L3-L4. Combines structured feedback, competency frameworks, and direct advice with coaching questions.

domains.name: Leadership coaching (mid-level)
domains.description: Developing the coachee's management capability, communication, and people leadership skills.
domains.embed_text: Mid-level leadership coaching: management capability, communication, influence, team, feedback, people skills, difficult conversations, delegation, leadership style, team dynamics. Typical levels L3-L4. Developmental coaching plus mentoring on leadership models and frameworks.

domains.name: Executive coaching (senior leadership)
domains.description: Supporting senior leaders on strategic leadership, behaviour change, presence, and organisational impact.
domains.embed_text: Executive coaching: strategic leadership, behaviour change, executive presence, board, C-suite, organisational impact, stakeholders, leading through change, culture. Typical levels L3-L5. High-level coaching, mentoring, consulting, and system coaching for senior leaders.
